title: lathyrus niger var. longipes
intro: Lathyrus niger var. longipes, also known as the perennial pea or sweet pea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus niger var. longipes include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
